format: Return a single JSON object with the required top-level keys. Do not include markdown or explanatory prose.

requested_cpt.description: Requested CPT code from the target authorization service line.

criteria_results.coverage_rule: Include PET-IND and PET-FACTOR exactly once with final results after the P2P.

resolved_criteria.description: Applicable criterion IDs that were unresolved before the completed P2P and are now resolved by new patient-specific information.
resolved_criteria.ordering_rule: Sort selected criterion IDs in ascending criterion ID order. Use an empty list only if no criteria were resolved.

new_information_changed_review.description: Whether new patient-specific information from the completed P2P materially changed the review.

supporting_pet_factors.description: PET-over-SPECT factor codes supported by current evidence after the P2P.
supporting_pet_factors.ordering_rule: Use the order shown in item_choices and include each supported factor once.

internal_appeal_deadline.description: Use null when no internal appeal deadline applies because the final determination is not adverse.

basis_audit.description: Business basis audit trail. Populate it using the source-precedence and record-grounding convention inferred from solved examples; use environment record IDs and business gap keys, not invented control codes.

source_precedence.description: Use the concise source-precedence category convention inferred from solved examples.

controlling_record_ids.ordering_rule: Use the operational evidence order for the records that directly control the result.

exception_record_ids.ordering_rule: Use business gap/exception order: criteria or route gaps before stale or excluded records when both appear.

precedence_record_order.ordering_rule: List the controlling and exception records in source-precedence order, highest priority first.

numeric_precision: Service units are whole integers. No currency or ratio fields are required.
date_precision: Dates must be ISO 8601 calendar dates in YYYY-MM-DD format.
